automation_phase: Phase 1 - Critical Risk Mitigation (Security & Financial Core)
roi_calculation: High. Manual execution takes ~30 hours/run. With daily CI runs, breakeven is reached in < 1 week. Prevents critical financial loss (double payments) and GDPR violations.
infrastructure_setup: CI Pipeline with Stripe Sandbox credentials & Mocking Strategy
success_metrics: 100% Pass rate on Idempotency & PII Redaction tests before merge. < 5 min execution time.
risk_factors: Complex mocking of Stripe signatures; Non-deterministic AI PII detection.
mitigation_strategies: Use deterministic pre-processing for PII; Use official Stripe testing libraries for signature generation.
business_value: Protects against the two highest risks: Financial discrepancy and Data Privacy lawsuits.

automation_phase: Phase 2 - API Contract & Business Logic (Backend Regression)
automation_tool: Jest (NestJS Testing Module), Supertest, PostgreSQL Test Containers
roi_calculation: Medium-High. Replaces repetitive manual API testing (approx 22 hours/run). ROI positive after 7 execution cycles (approx 3 sprints).
infrastructure_setup: Ephemeral Test Database creation in CI pipeline (Docker Compose)
success_metrics: 90% Branch Coverage on Service/Controller layers. Zero regression bugs in Vendor/Client management.
risk_factors: Database schema changes breaking tests; Vector search complexity.
mitigation_strategies: Use TypeORM migrations in test setup; Mock pgvector responses for logic tests, use real db for integration.
business_value: Ensures stability of core CRUD operations and Vector Search logic required for Vendor Matching.

roi_calculation: Medium. UI tests are brittle but catch integration issues. Manual equivalent is ~40 hours/run. Breakeven ~5 weeks.
infrastructure_setup: Headless browser environment in CI; Test data seeding scripts
success_metrics: Critical user paths (Login -> Upload SOW -> Proposal) verified nightly.
risk_factors: Flaky tests due to UI rendering delays; DOM changes breaking selectors.
mitigation_strategies: Use Playwright locators (data-testid); Implement visual regression testing cautiously.
business_value: Validates the actual user experience for System Admins and Vendors, catching UI/UX regressions.

roi_calculation: Long-term. Prevents catastrophic scaling failures. Cost of downtime >> Automation cost.
success_metrics: Infrastructure code validated pre-deploy; API p95 response < 250ms confirmed under load.
risk_factors: Cost of running performance environment; False positives in infra tests.
mitigation_strategies: Schedule K6 tests during low-cost hours; Destroy perf environment after use.
business_value: Guarantees system availability (99.9%) and scalability under load, adhering to NFRs.

roi_calculation: Strategic. Hard to quantify in hours saved, but essential for 'AI Trust'. Prevents model hallucination risks.
infrastructure_setup: Vector Database sandbox for accuracy benchmarking
success_metrics: LLM Extraction accuracy > 95%; Zero high-risk security vulnerabilities found.
risk_factors: Subjectivity of AI results; Cost of OpenAI tokens for testing.
mitigation_strategies: Use cached LLM responses for regression; Human review of borderline test failures.
business_value: Ensures the 'Intelligent' part of the platform works correctly and securely.
